name: Aarav Sharma
summary: Highly motivated and detail-oriented software engineer with a strong background in computer science, seeking to leverage my skills in designing scalable backend services and building REST APIs.

experience.title: Software Development Engineer (SDE I)
bullets: Designed and developed scalable backend services using Java, Spring Boot, and MongoDB.
Built REST APIs for data exchange between frontend and backend applications.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to ensure seamless integration of features.

experience.title: Intern
bullets: Implemented JWT Authentication in a full-stack expense tracking application using React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB.
Created analytics dashboard for data visualization and insights.
Integrated REST APIs for seamless API calls.

projects.name: Expense Tracker

projects.technologies: Java, Spring Boot, MongoDB, React.js, HTML, CSS

projects.name: Chat Application
projects.description: A real-time chat application built using Socket.io, with one-to-one messaging and online/offline status features.
